message:
chore(beads): sync issue store — 23 issues touched during reality-check pass

Routine beads.jsonl update from ongoing work this session:
- 23 issues modified (metadata/status/updated_at)
- Equal add/delete count typical of in-place field updates
- No schema changes, no new or closed issues surfacing

Matches the existing cadence in recent history (see b2de44f,
f9a4b15). The .br_history/ snapshots remain untracked — those are
ephemeral timestamped history files from br sync, not intended
for git.
